label: Def
description: Base type for all RimWorld defs. Provides the common identity fields shared by every def type.

Name.label: Name (XML template)
Name.description: XML inheritance template identifier. Allows other defs to inherit from this node using ParentName. Not the same as defName - this is not a game database identity.

ParentName.label: Parent name (XML inheritance)
ParentName.description: Name of the XML template node this def inherits from. The loader merges fields from the named template before applying this node's own fields.

Abstract.label: Abstract
Abstract.description: When true, this node is an XML inheritance template and is not loaded as a real def into the game's DefDatabase.

defName.label: Def name
defName.description: Unique identifier for this def. Used in XML cross-references and game code lookups.

label.label: Label
label.description: Short human-readable name shown in the UI. Supports translation keys.

description.label: Description
description.description: Longer text shown in the info card or tooltip. Supports translation keys.

descriptionHyperlinks.label: Description hyperlinks
descriptionHyperlinks.description: Defs linked from this def's description. Each row selects a target def type and def name. The game renders these as clickable links in the info card.

ignoreConfigErrors.label: Ignore config errors
ignoreConfigErrors.description: Suppresses XML validation errors for this def during startup. Useful while authoring incomplete defs.

ignoreIllegalLabelCharacterConfigError.label: Ignore illegal label character config error
ignoreIllegalLabelCharacterConfigError.description: Suppresses the config error that fires when the label contains characters illegal for translation keys. Used by backstory defs whose titles include punctuation.

modExtensions.label: Mod extensions
modExtensions.description: List of modder-defined extension objects attached to this def at runtime. Each extension must specify a Class attribute.
